full_text:
He Zong (Yanying) 何宗 (彥英)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Zong (何宗), styledYanying (彥英), was born in Shu. Encouraged Liu Bei to become Emperor. Noted scholar of the Book of Changes. He Zong was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. He Zong lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
